title: syngramma elaphoglossoides
intro: Syngramma elaphoglossoides is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the 'Elaphoglossum fern', native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Syngramma elaphoglossoides include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine.
